assessment_objectives.objective: the organization implements a role-based access scheme or an attribute-based access scheme.
privileged user accounts are established and administered in accordance with organization-defined parameters.
access to sensitive / regulated data requiring special protection is granted only to individuals who have a valid access authorization that is demonstrated by assigned duties.
access to sensitive / regulated data requiring special protection is granted only to individuals who satisfy associated personnel security criteria.
access to sensitive / regulated data requiring special protection is granted only to individuals who have read, understood and signed a non-disclosure agreement.
privileged role or attribute assignments are monitored.
changes to roles or attributes are monitored.
access is revoked when privileged role or attribute assignments are no longer appropriate.
security functions for authorized access are defined.
security-relevant information for authorized access is defined.
access to <A.03.01.05.ODP[01]: security functions> is authorized.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: at a minimum and if applicable: establishing system accounts and assigning privileges, configuring access authorizations, configuring settings for events to be audited, establishing vulnerability scanning parameters, establishing intrusion detection parameters, and managing audit information

assessment_objectives.objective: access to <A.03.01.05.ODP[02]: security-relevant information> is authorized.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: at a minimum and if applicable: threat and vulnerability information, filtering rules for routers or firewalls, configuration parameters for security services, cryptographic key management information, security architecture, access control lists, and audit information

assessment_objectives.objective: logical access restrictions associated with changes to the system are defined and documented.
the incident response plan is protected from unauthorized disclosure.
